items.title: Jeff Bezos Urges Gen Z Entrepreneurs To Gain Work Experience Before Launching Startups
items.description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos told young entrepreneurs that building real-world experience before starting a company can dramatically improve the odds of success. Bezos Highlights The Importance Of Work Experience For Startup Success Last week, during an interview at Italian Tech Week, Bezos emphasized that college dropouts like Mark Zuckerberg and Bill Gates are the "exception" rather than the rule for startup success. "I always advise young people: Go work at a best-practices company somewhere whe

items.title: Amazon buys $97 million mega warehouse to expand US distribution network
items.description: Amazon has paid $97.6 million for a massive warehouse and distribution center located in Ocala, Florida.

items.title: What's driving the latest bout of AI deals? Analyst answers.
items.description: Moor Insights & Strategy founder, CEO, and chief analyst Patrick Moorhead and Futurum CEO Daniel Newman discuss the AI milestones that could push Big Tech companies and hyperscalers even farther, including meeting compute capacity and demands, amid the latest round of artificial intelligence deals and partnerships. Also catch Daniel Newman and Patrick Moorhead weigh in on whether bubbles are forming in the AI trade. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: Starlink Rival AST SpaceMobile Gets Rare Sell Amid 254% Run
items.description: With Elon Musk’s SpaceX division, Starlink, rushing to overtake it, AST is positioned for “painful corrections,” according to a Scotiabank analyst.  “In the midst of an impressive bull market, extreme volatility in recent days has led to what we see as a valuation bubble,” analyst Andres Coello wrote in a note Tuesday downgrading the stock to sector underperform from sector perform.  After a key satellite launch setback, he fears further delays may encourage some carriers to explore ditching AST SpaceMobile and moving to Starlink.

items.title: Smart Health at Your Fingertips: Tech Analyst Mike Bako Highlights RENPHO’s Prime Big Deal Days Must-Haves with YourUpdateTV
items.description: Tech analyst Mike Bako joins YourUpdateTV to showcase RENPHO’s Prime Big Deal Days innovations, the MorphoScan Body Composition Analyzer and LYNX Smart Ring, bringing professional-level health insights into everyday life at gift-worthy prices Tech analyst Mike Bako joins YourUpdateTV to showcase RENPHO’s Prime Big Deal Days innovations, the MorphoScan Body Composition Analyzer and LYNX Smart Ring, bringing professional-level health insights into everyday life at gift-worthy prices.
